title: recycled gear
description: Salvage tools and armor using a stonecutter
body:
### This simple datapack/mod adds stonecutter recipes for gaining back materials used for tools.
### 
![Example image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fd52690d001c0c7726b7573175fff33e8c92b8b.png)


## Compatability: 
Even though the datapack is marked as incompatible for most versions other than 1.20.1, it should still work for all versions from 1.14 - 1.20.4
## 

## Recycleable Gear:
- All Tools and Armor
- Bows, Crossbows
- Rods (Carrot/Fungus on a stick too)
- Shield
- Flint and Steel, shears
- Clock, Compass
- Spyglass, Brush


### Planned:
~~- Option to get sticks or material~~  -done

~~- Add recipes for other gear (Rod, Bow etc)~~  -done
- Maybe mod support
